creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 165499
patch for updating the port

- update to 0.50
- changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/SRVSH/RT-Client-REST-0.50/CHANGES
- fix *_DEPENDS lists

- "portlint -AC" says:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTEPOCH.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

Tested with poudriere (logs attached) at
11.0-CURRENT-amd64 with perl-5.20.3
